subcodes.first_line: O thou who art oppressed! The oppression visited upon 'Abdu'l-Bahá hath surpassed the oppression endured by all others, for if the oppressed ones of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظلوم مظلومیت عبدالبهاء بر مظلومیت کل غلبه نمود زیرا مظلومین آفاق اگر هدف
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
